caveat: The pre-registered gate, written and panel-amended before the run. Both outcomes were declared informative in advance -- an escape would convict the clamp, a collapse acquits it -- so the probe could not produce a spin-dependent result. The spurious-fire guard is the arc's checks-that-learn motif continued: the gate names, in advance, two specific ways a naive threshold could false-fire, and requires variance AND structure at the same recorded step. Single realization / fixed cosmology; z=0.3 scope-lock.
internal_lineage: [D-73] §E rule verbatim + amendment-1 AM-1 (voiding), AM-2 (guard + null bound), AM-4 (frame correction)
